---
title: "nitrix.stats.inference.tfce"
generated: true
signature-hash: cbff6a622e477ad7
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.inference.tfce`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## `tfce` {#tfce}

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:tfce -->
```python
tfce(stat: Float[Array, '*spatial'], *, E: float = 0.5, H: float = 2.0, n_steps: int = 100, connectivity: int = 1, two_sided: bool = True, mask: Optional[Bool[Array, '*spatial']] = None) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:tfce -->
Threshold-free cluster enhancement of a statistic image.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:tfce -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `stat` | `Float` | `*spatial` | — | Statistic image (e.g. a t-map), arbitrary spatial dimensionality. |
| `E` | `float` | — | `0.5` | Extent and height exponents (defaults `0.5` / `2.0` -- 3-D volume). |
| `H` | `float` | — | `2.0` | Extent and height exponents (defaults `0.5` / `2.0` -- 3-D volume). |
| `n_steps` | `int` | — | `100` | Number of threshold steps in the Riemann sum (FSL default ~100). |
| `connectivity` | `int` | — | `1` | Neighbourhood order for cluster forming (`1` = faces; `ndim` = full, incl. diagonals -- the scipy convention). |
| `two_sided` | `bool` | — | `True` | Enhance the negative side as well (default `True`); the result is the non-negative magnitude map used for two-sided max-statistic FWE. |
| `mask` | `Optional[Bool[Array, '*spatial']]` | — | `None` | Optional spatial mask; out-of-mask voxels are zeroed before enhancement. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
